objective: Reconcile the existing representation contract, v3 typed scene, and H1 reference suite into one stable engine-neutral humanoid representation profile with deterministic structural proof.
next_action: Audit the representation-contract and reference-viewport schemas together, identify identity, coordinate, hierarchy, bind/rest-pose, role, topology, serialization, and authority gaps, then implement the smallest typed alignment and adversarial fixtures without adding surfaces, skinning, deformation, engines, or visual-quality claims.
research_gate: Use existing repository contracts, H1 evidence, and synthetic fixtures. No external acquisition or runtime research is required unless a risk-critical contract ambiguity cannot be resolved locally.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized implementation of the approved master plan. The profile is a structural proof candidate only; no perceptual approval, production promotion, engine selection, external execution, or protected-Kernel mutation.
context_health: Green after H1 full-gate pass. Forge capture is current and heartbeat remains paused.
unresolved_risks: The representation contract and viewport scene may use different joint/identity vocabularies.
The v3 fixture may lack explicit bind transforms, units, or stable semantic role mapping.
The recovered blueprint is declared legacy evidence and cannot supply verified dimensions or quality thresholds.
Surface topology, skinning, deformation, and visual convergence remain outside H2.
evidence_requirements: explicit rest/bind pose and joint-role mapping
bounded topology and deterministic canonical bytes
H1 source lineage without legacy authority escalation
adversarial missing-role, cycle, drift, unknown-field, and overclaim fixtures
verification_plan: inspect existing representation-contract and reference-viewport code and contracts
implement a small typed neutral humanoid profile or adapter in a capability-free module
bind the H1 suite by fingerprint without importing recovered content
run modularity, focused, and complete Forge gates
advance automatically to H3 only after H2 is verified
resume_after: Continue automatically after progress updates. Ask the owner only for a genuine authority boundary or irreducible design choice.
verification_receipts: H1 archive fixity and duplicate provenance verified
transition: R0 accepted -> H1 reference intake verified -> H2 neutral representation executing
